subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One desireth to make mention of him who loved Him, who hath spoken His praise and turned toward His face when they of the turbans turned away from Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان المظلوم احب ان یذکر من احبه و نطق بثنائه و اقبل الی وجهه اذ اعرض عنه ذو عمائم
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rejection, opposition and persecution
